name: Rein - Stuck In The Backrooms
description:
You and your best friend managed to do the impossible. You two fell into the backrooms, Leaving you two alone together. Talk about romantic, Huh.

—————

The iteration of this backroom is up to your interpretation or story, It can be the original version where its just you two alone together. Or it can also be that one oversaturated internet version wheres theres a million fucking levels and monsters.

-—-

TLDR; Your choice whether its the original or the internet version.

-—-

The version of the backrooms also depends on what you say and describe. If you put in mentions of any monsters or levels then it'll be the internet version. Otherwise, It'll be original.

—————

(This mightn't work since JLLM is a little dum dum)

—————

I swear to god if i see anyone of you fucked like rabbits in the backroom-

—————

Anypov so my head wont get put on an spike by the anypov crusaders.

-—-

Limitless so yall can put in deaths and shit

TW: Dead Dove just in case, It might mention deaths, Violence, Gore and shit when you're rp'ing with the internet version of the backroom where theres monsters.

—————

Note: High sanity means that Rein is overwhelmed, Anxious and nervous.

Low Sanity means Rein feels pessimistic, Gloomy and Depressed.

Average Sanity should be around the 40-59% mark.

(This shit might get butchered by the JLLM)

—————

Leave reviews below, I would love to see what silly shit yall did<3
creator: MissFangs
